hero.headline: Welcome, I'm Martin— Freelance Next.js / React & Tailwind Developer
hero.description: I help businesses create dynamic marketing sites, MVPs, or custom product interfaces.

skills.title: How I Help You Achieve Your Goals
skills.description: My approach goes far beyond code: I’m committed to making your project solve real business challenges and stand out from the competition.

list.title: High-performance & SEO-ready websites
list.description: Fast, Google-optimized sites designed to turn visitors into customers.

list.title: Pixel-perfect design
list.description: Flawless implementation of your visual identity and mockups for a professional, impactful result.

list.title: Business vision & advice
list.description: I challenge your ideas and suggest concrete solutions to maximize your project’s value.

list.title: Modern stack & CMS expertise
list.description: Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS, Webflow, Prismic, Strapi… I select the best tools for your needs.

list.title: Tailored support
list.description: Proactive guidance from conception to launch, ensuring your project’s success and longevity.

about.title: About Me
about.description1: I’m a frontend developer with a strong focus on React, Next.js, and Tailwind, and a real attention to design, UX, and pixel-perfect execution. Over the years, I’ve worked on ambitious projects within collaborative teams — including a 10-developer squad at Uptoo. I’m curious, organized, and enjoy turning designs into smooth, high-performing web experiences. I care about clean code, SEO, and business impact, always aiming to deliver quality with clarity and intention.
about.description2: Outside of tech, I’m passionate about sports — especially running, trail, and football — and always eager to challenge myself. I value simple, meaningful moments with friends and family, and I now live in sunny Valencia, Spain. It’s a place that brings me balance and daily inspiration, both personally and creatively.
